extortion.description: Alios Finance Group , is a leading operator in Africa providing specialized financial solutions to Professionals and Individuals. We are operating in 9 Sub-Saharan countries (Burkina-Faso, Cameroon, Ivory Coast, Gabon, Kenya, Mali, Senegal, Tanzania and Zambia). Our Group is also present in North Africa (Algeria and Tunisia) through our main shareholder: Tunisie Leasing Group. 100GB of fresh data (last 3 years)
